title: Cintas First Aid and Safety Location in Canton, Ohio Certified as VPP Star Site
text: CINCINNATI--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ohio OSHA formally honored Cintas Corporation's (Nasdaq: CTAS) First Aid and Safety Location in Canton, Ohio, as a Voluntary Protection Program (VPP) Star certified location during Friday's ceremony at the Pro Football Hall of Fame. The VPP Star program was created by the Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA) to recognize stand-out worksites that have comprehensive, successful safety and health management systems.
